evals.prompt: Use these validated reply and segment findings to recommend the next campaign. I need the audience, exclusions, offer, angle, sequence, CTA, and experiment hypothesis, but not the email copy yet.
evals.input: Synthetic analyst handoff: exact finding—RevOps directors produced 6 positive replies from 180 contacted leads; hydrated finding—3 wrong-person replies referred to finance operations; sampled finding—companies with 200-1000 employees were 5 of the 6 positives. Primary constraint is audience focus. Allowed proof is limited to these counts.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed campaign blueprint with explicit audience and exclusions, offer, angle, proof boundary, CTA, sequence architecture, and a one-variable experiment, while deferring email bodies.
assertions: Audience inclusion and exclusion criteria are explicit
Problem, offer, angle, proof boundary, and CTA are coherent
Full email bodies are deferred to sendlens-copywriter

objective_checks.description: Defines both the target audience and explicit exclusions.
Limits allowed proof to the supplied synthetic counts.
Defines an experiment with a cohort and one changed strategic variable.
Defers full email bodies to the copywriting stage.

evals.prompt: Our best campaign has weak replies and several unhealthy senders. Design a new message campaign to fix it.
evals.input: Synthetic analyst handoff: the campaign has 900 sends, 7 human replies, and 1 positive reply; four of six assigned senders have stored 30-day bounce rates above the operator's documented 5% block threshold. No hydrated replies or copy-path evidence exists. The primary constraint is sender health.
evals.expected_output: A constrained strategy decision that refuses to disguise sender risk as a messaging problem, prioritizes sender remediation, and conditions any later message experiment on validated evidence.
assertions: Sender or deliverability risk is not disguised as a message problem
The campaign test is deferred or conditioned on remediation
Unknowns that could change the strategy are explicit

objective_checks.description: Names sender health or deliverability as the primary constraint.
Defers the message campaign until sender remediation is complete.
Names missing hydrated reply or copy-path evidence as an unresolved unknown.

evals.prompt: Turn the validated wrong-person reply pattern into a campaign experiment for a better role segment.
evals.input: Synthetic validated evidence: 8 of 20 hydrated human replies from a broad operations cohort say the recipient is the wrong owner, and 6 explicitly refer the sender to Finance Operations. Keep the audit offer, proof, CTA, sequence length, and sender pool fixed; only the target role segment may change.
evals.expected_output: A one-variable campaign experiment that changes the target role to Finance Operations, holds the offer and execution variables fixed, and defines cohort, learning goal, and outcome signal.
assertions: The audience shift is tied to reply evidence
The experiment changes one strategic variable
The cohort, changed and fixed variables, intended learning, and outcome signal are explicit

objective_checks.description: Uses Finance Operations as the evidence-backed role segment.
Keeps the supplied offer, CTA, sequence, and sender variables fixed.
Defines a primary outcome signal for the new cohort.
